Connection Finder
Scans 48hr journal + tasks · surfaces non-obvious links
Connection Finder scans your last 48 hours of journal entries, tasks, and captures — then finds non-obvious links between ideas. Results appear as Connection Notes: Note A ↔ Note B → what it reveals → implication → surprise level.

Sunday 7PM · or manual · full week in one report

Monthly scan · journal + task history · recurring themes
Pattern Detector scans your journal + task history for recurring themes, emotional signatures, and behavioral loops. Outputs: pattern found · frequency · meaning · recommended action.

Security & Access

AI Integrations
Free key: aistudio.google.com/apikey
If this voice name doesn't work, check Google's current TTS voice list and enter the correct name here — falls back to Onyx or browser voice automatically either way.
Google occasionally retires older model names. If Gemini chat starts failing with a 404, check current names at ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models and update here — no code change needed.
elevenlabs.io → Profile → API Keys · Voice: David (repurposed as a calm executive advisor)
Google Workspace
Ask JELIX
Refresh
JELIX quietly consults the right specialist(s) — tasks, calendar, finance, marketing, and more — and acts on Gmail, Calendar, Drive, or JELIX OS itself when needed. All in-browser, no external process. Needs a Gemini and/or Anthropic API key above.
